data.title: Bezant Resources Reports Change in Major Shareholdings
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Bezant Resources ( (GB:BZT) ) has shared an announcement.

Bezant Resources PLC has received a TR-1 notification regarding a change in major holdings. The notification indicates that Jonathan Mark Swann has reached a holding of 3.06% of the voting rights in the company as of February 17, 2025. This change in holdings might influence the company’s shareholder dynamics and impact future decision-making processes.

More about Bezant Resources

Bezant Resources PLC is a company focused on the exploration and development of copper and gold. It is listed on the AIM market and aims to strengthen its position within the mining industry by acquiring and developing mineral projects.

data.title: Pine Technology Announces Expected Interim Loss
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Pine Technology Holdings Limited ( (HK:1079) ) has provided an update.

Pine Technology Holdings Limited has issued a profit warning indicating an expected unaudited consolidated net loss after tax of no less than approximately HK$6.0 million for the six months ended 31 December 2024. This shift from a net profit of HK$51.8 million in the same period the previous year is mainly due to the absence of a one-off significant gain from the disposal of subsidiaries. Stakeholders are advised to exercise caution as the financial results for the period have not yet been finalized and may be subject to adjustments.

More about Pine Technology Holdings Limited

Pine Technology Holdings Limited is incorporated in Bermuda and operates in the technology sector. The company is listed on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong and engages in various technology-related businesses.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €8.93M

Learn more about 1079 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:

An update from Benchmark Holdings ( (GB:BMK) ) is now available.

Benchmark Holdings is set to announce its Q1 2024 results on February 28, 2025, with an online presentation hosted by CEO Trond Williksen and CFO Septima Maguire. This announcement could provide insights into the company’s operational performance and strategy, potentially impacting stakeholders and highlighting its industry positioning.

More about Benchmark Holdings

Benchmark Holdings plc operates in the aquaculture biotechnology industry, focusing on improving sustainability and profitability for aquaculture producers. They offer innovative products that enhance yield, quality, and animal health by advancing genetic makeup, health, and nutrition of aquaculture stocks. Their product portfolio includes salmon eggs, live feed, diets, probiotics, and sea lice treatments.

data.description:

  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

TSH Resources Bhd. ( (SG:TSH) ) has provided an announcement.

TSH Resources Berhad announced a share buy-back, purchasing 1,000,000 shares at a price range of MYR 1.230 to MYR 1.260, with a total consideration of MYR 1,252,537.84. This move reflects the company’s strategy to manage its share capital effectively, retaining the shares in treasury and maintaining a stable market position, with treasury shares now constituting 2.10813% of total issued shares.

More about TSH Resources Bhd.

TSH Resources Berhad operates in the agribusiness sector, primarily focusing on the production and sale of palm oil products. The company is based in Malaysia and targets both local and international markets with its range of agricultural commodities.

data.title: Xinming China Holdings Embraces Digital Shift in Corporate Communications
data.description:

An update from Xinming China Holdings Limited ( (HK:2699) ) is now available.

Xinming China Holdings Limited has announced a shift to electronic dissemination of its corporate communications in line with updated regulations effective from December 31, 2023. This move is expected to streamline operations and improve accessibility of information for stakeholders, as documents will now be available digitally on the company’s website and the Stock Exchange’s site. Printed copies will only be available upon request, reflecting a broader trend towards digital transformation in corporate communication practices.

More about Xinming China Holdings Limited

Xinming China Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability. It is listed on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong and primarily focuses on offering corporate communications to its stakeholders.

data.title: Mercuria Holdings Revises Earnings Forecast and Records Investment Loss
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Mercuria Holdings Co., Ltd. ( (JP:7347) ) has shared an announcement.

Mercuria Holdings Co., Ltd. reported a loss on valuation of operational investment securities amounting to 664 million yen due to its buyout fund’s performance in the fourth quarter of 2024. Consequently, the company revised its earnings forecast for the year, reflecting a significant decrease in expected profits compared to previous estimates. This has led to the cancellation of performance-related compensation for its top executives, although the dividend forecast remains unchanged.

More about Mercuria Holdings Co., Ltd.

Mercuria Holdings Co., Ltd. operates in the financial services industry, focusing on fund management and principal investments. The company manages and operates funds, including buyout funds, as part of its core business activities.

data.description:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

An announcement from IHH Healthcare Bhd ( (IHHHF) ) is now available.

The Employees Provident Fund Board has increased its direct interest in IHH Healthcare Bhd by acquiring an additional 3,783,700 ordinary shares. This acquisition elevates the Board’s stake to 10.236%, reinforcing its position as a significant shareholder. This move may indicate a strategic interest in IHH Healthcare’s operations, potentially affecting future stakeholder decisions and market perceptions of the company’s growth trajectory.

More about IHH Healthcare Bhd

IHH Healthcare Bhd operates in the healthcare industry, providing a variety of medical services and hospital management solutions. It is one of the largest healthcare providers in the world, with a focus primarily on private healthcare and hospital operations across Asia, Central and Eastern Europe, and the Middle East.
